package rulecoverage

func NegativeRwmutexWithoutClearReadHeavySignal() string {
    ruleID := "rwmutex_without_clear_read_heavy_signal"
    family := "concurrency"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "sync.RWMutex usage without a clear read-heavy access pattern."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
